senses.gloss: Used with وَ (wa) followed by a word referring to God, to make an oath that expresses agreement.

examples.english: Yes, by God, you are right.

examples.text: وَيَسْتَنْبِئُونَكَ أَحَقٌّ هُوَ قُلْ إِي وَرَبِّي إِنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ وَمَا أَنْتُمْ بِمُعْجِزِينَ
examples.english: And they ask thee to inform them: "Is it true?" Say: "Yes, by my Lord, verily it is true, and ye cannot escape."
